commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Cloud. Isaias lix. 2., and Ecclesiasticus xxxv. 21. These expressions are admirable.

commentaries.author: Thomas Aquinas
commentaries.content: Second, is a refusal from prayer of a person sinning. Verse 44 thus says: "Thou hast wrapped thyself with a cloud", Namely, regarding such sins displaying faults against prayer. Thus, Isaiah 59:2 claims: "But your iniquities have made a separation between you and your God."
